nasb.text: But we believe that we are saved through the grace of the Lord Jesus, in the same way as they also are.”

esv.text: But we believe that we will be saved through the grace of the Lord Jesus, just as they will.”

cnv.text: 我們相信，我們得救是藉著主耶穌的恩，和他們也是一樣。”

ccb.text: 我们相信，他们和我们一样都是靠主耶稣的恩典得救。”

csbs.text: 相反，我们相信：我们得救是藉着主耶稣的恩典，外邦人也是一样。”
